case_title: NATALIA PETRAS ET AL VS. JEFFREY NISEWANGER ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,630.00 FILED BY PETRAS, NATALIA PETRAS, PETER AS TO DEFENDANT NISEWANGER, JEFFREY GOEI, EDWIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-28-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 SERVED AUG-11-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT NISEWANGER, JEFFREY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-28-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-28-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF NATALIA PETRAS & PETER PETRAS, AND DEFENDANT JEFFREY NISEWANGER. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT EDWIN GOEI, WHO IS ILL AND UNABLE TO ATTEND THIS MORNING'S PROCEEDINGS. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE AS TO BOTH DEFENDANTS. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-28-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PETRAS, NATALIA PETRAS, PETER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NISEWANGER, JEFFREY GOEI, EDWIN $1,890.00 PRINCIPAL, $155.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,045.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 SERVED AUG-11-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GOEI, EDWIN
